nodes.norm_label: expected business failures → union result types

nodes.label: List components with filter, sort, pagination
nodes.norm_label: list components with filter, sort, pagination

nodes.label: Layer layout — one file per domain
nodes.norm_label: layer layout — one file per domain

nodes.label: Feature workflow: product doc → api-design → code → frontend docs
nodes.norm_label: feature workflow: product doc → api-design → code → frontend docs

nodes.label: Stock Changes Only Via Inventory Log Service
nodes.norm_label: stock changes only via inventory log service

nodes.label: Category
nodes.rationale: Every component belongs to a category; per-user taxonomy with seeded defaults and custom additions.

nodes.label: lowStockThreshold
nodes.rationale: Per-category minimum qty before UI shows low stock; replaces hard-coded global threshold of 5.

nodes.label: Settings → Categories
nodes.rationale: v1.1 moves category management from top-level /categories nav into Settings.

nodes.label: groupName
nodes.rationale: Optional free-text label on Component for visual list grouping; deferred in current v1.1 slice.

nodes.label: ComponentGroup entity
nodes.rationale: Separate ComponentGroup entity deferred; flat list until grouping picked up.

nodes.label: Component
nodes.rationale: One catalog entry per part type; quantity split across storage boxes, not a single field.

nodes.label: resourceUrl (Resource link)
nodes.rationale: Optional external URL to datasheet or reference; no file upload in v1.1.

nodes.label: totalQty
nodes.rationale: Sum of all box quantities for a component; used for low-stock comparison.

nodes.label: Inventory log
nodes.rationale: Immutable audit trail; every stock change creates a log row; no silent qty edits.

nodes.label: Storage box
nodes.rationale: Free-text box identifier; no predefined box master in v1.

nodes.label: ComponentBoxQuantity
nodes.rationale: Per-component (box, quantity) pairs; total equals sum.

nodes.label: Stock reallocation
nodes.rationale: Move stock between boxes in one action via REALLOCATE; total qty unchanged.

nodes.label: User account
nodes.rationale: Each student has private inventory; email+password auth with JWT session.

nodes.label: NextAuth v5 Credentials
nodes.rationale: Credentials provider calls GraphQL login/register; JWT stored as session.accessToken.

nodes.label: TanStack Query + graphql-request
nodes.rationale: Not Apollo; base useGraphQuery/useGraphMutation attach JWT and handle errors.

nodes.label: Vite SPA production target
nodes.rationale: Reuse src/components, hooks, lib, react-query; swap routing/auth shell only.

nodes.label: components/ui/ (shadcn CLI only)
nodes.rationale: Do not hand-edit shadcn primitives; extend in includes/ or modules/.

nodes.label: Document file icon with folded corner and horizontal text lines
nodes.norm_label: document file icon with folded corner and horizontal text lines
